venues.name: TwinBox AKIHABARA
venues.location: Box'R AKIBA Building B1F, 3-2-12 Sotokanda, Chiyoda, Tokyo, Japan
venues.description: A compact Akihabara live house focused on idol events and two-man or multi-act showcases. The basement floor is a common stop for small and mid-scale Tokyo idol circuits.

venues.name: 赤坂BLITZ
venues.location: Akasaka Sacas, 5-3-2 Akasaka, Minato, Tokyo, Japan
venues.description: A well-known former Tokyo live venue that hosted major idol and rock shows before closing in 2020. It is useful in historical schedules and legacy concert data.

venues.name: clubasia
venues.description: A long-running Shibuya club and live venue with multiple floors, known for late-night events, dance music, and underground idol bookings.

venues.name: Spotify O-EAST
venues.description: One of Shibuya's signature live houses, used for larger club tours, idol one-man shows, and festival circuit dates. It was previously known as TSUTAYA O-EAST.

venues.name: 幕張メッセ
venues.description: A major convention and event complex in Chiba used for expos, large concerts, and arena-scale idol events. The event hall is a common destination for bigger national showcases.
